steps.title: Read both values at x = 1 from the graph
steps.content: At $x = 1$, the data point is positioned at approximately $y = 11$, while the line of best fit passes through approximately $y = 10.5$ (midway between the $y = 10$ and $y = 11$ gridlines).

steps.title: Calculate the residual
steps.content: The residual is the vertical distance between the data point and the line: $|11 - 10.5| = 0.5$. Among the given choices, the closest value to $0.5$ is $1$. That matches choice A — A is correct.
